imagegen_reference_only.purpose: Non-evidence layout reference for a material risk-matrix page with render thumbnails.

evidence: The new atlas maps the material-effect risk-matrix rows to real Original MDL, ConvertAsset, and NVIDIA render evidence.
The covered-bin, clearcoat, and procedural-texture bands are visually separated and keep the claim boundary visible.
The source figure and rendered PDF page do not show a large red fallback-material artifact.
The figure is now forced before the material risk matrix using a FloatBarrier, so the previous sparse table-first page is replaced by a render-first visual page.
risks: This is a local visual review, not an independent fork-context review.
The material risk matrix and recommender pages after the atlas remain table/text heavy and are still candidates for later reflow.
The image-generation output was used only as a layout reference and is not paper evidence.

verification_commands: python paper/shared/figures/gen_supplement_task_media_atlases.py && python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "material_claim_boundary_atlas or has_task_media_atlases"

pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf - | rg -n "Figure S10|Material claim-boundary visual atlas|Red material|registered diagnostic figure|fig_vlm_grounding_cases|/cpfs|zhuzihou|jandan138|github.com|ConvertAsset.git" -S
